title: Pencil Case for Kids - Includes Calculator, Sharpener, Class Timetable & Stickers, 2 Large Compartments | Assorted Designs: Unicorns, Fairies, Space Dinosaurs, Transport (Space Dinosaurs)
features: ORGANIZED STORAGE: Features two large main compartments and four secret compartments, including a built-in calculator and a sharpener with a flip-top lid for easy emptying.
CONVENIENT & MULTIFUNCTIONAL: Equipped with a calculator and sharpener, making it a versatile tool for school needs.
PERSONALIZED DETAILS: Includes a name and class sticker for customization, along with a class timetable to help keep track of important dates.
FUN & ENGAGING DESIGNS: Available in assorted designs such as Space Dinosaurs and Transport, adding a playful touch to school supplies.
IDEAL FOR ALL KIDS: Perfect for boys and girls, making it a must-have accessory for back-to-school season.
SECRET COMPARTMENTS: Four hidden compartments provide additional storage for small items, keeping everything neatly organized.
